title: Part 1 – Entraînement 3 : santé, restauration & vie quotidienne
instructions: Pour chaque photo, écoutez les quatre propositions et choisissez celle qui décrit le mieux l'image.

image.alt: Un médecin en blouse blanche consultant un patient assis en face de lui dans un cabinet médical

items.audioText: (A) The doctor is writing a prescription at his desk. (B) The doctor is consulting a patient in his office. (C) The doctor is examining equipment in a lab. (D) The doctor is speaking on the phone.
choices: The doctor is writing a prescription at his desk.
The doctor is consulting a patient in his office.
The doctor is examining equipment in a lab.
The doctor is speaking on the phone.
items.explanation: Un médecin est en consultation avec un patient dans son cabinet : (B) est correct.

image.alt: Un chef cuisinier en tablier blanc préparant des plats dans une cuisine professionnelle

items.audioText: (A) The chef is serving food to customers. (B) The chef is washing dishes in the kitchen. (C) The chef is preparing dishes in a professional kitchen. (D) The chef is reading a recipe book.
choices: The chef is serving food to customers.
The chef is washing dishes in the kitchen.
The chef is preparing dishes in a professional kitchen.
The chef is reading a recipe book.
items.explanation: Le chef prépare des plats dans une cuisine professionnelle : (C) est la bonne réponse.

image.alt: Des personnes faisant la queue à un guichet de banque, avec un agent derrière une vitre en plexiglas

items.audioText: (A) People are withdrawing money from an ATM. (B) People are waiting in line at a bank counter. (C) People are sitting in a waiting room. (D) People are leaving a bank branch.
choices: People are withdrawing money from an ATM.
People are waiting in line at a bank counter.
People are sitting in a waiting room.
People are leaving a bank branch.
items.explanation: Des personnes font la queue au guichet d'une banque : (B) est correct.

image.alt: Deux collègues debout dans un espace de pause, tenant des tasses à café et discutant

items.audioText: (A) Two colleagues are having coffee and chatting in a break area. (B) Two colleagues are working at their desks. (C) Two colleagues are arguing in a meeting room. (D) Two colleagues are leaving the office.
choices: Two colleagues are having coffee and chatting in a break area.
Two colleagues are working at their desks.
Two colleagues are arguing in a meeting room.
Two colleagues are leaving the office.
items.explanation: Deux collègues discutent en tenant des tasses de café dans un espace de pause : (A) est correct.

image.alt: Un homme consultant son téléphone portable tout en marchant dans la rue devant des commerces

items.audioText: (A) The man is taking a photo of a store window. (B) The man is checking his phone while walking along a street. (C) The man is buying something at a shop. (D) The man is waiting at a bus stop.
choices: The man is taking a photo of a store window.
The man is checking his phone while walking along a street.
The man is buying something at a shop.
The man is waiting at a bus stop.
items.explanation: Il regarde son téléphone en marchant dans la rue : (B) est la description exacte.

image.alt: Une infirmière prenant la tension artérielle d'un patient assis dans un couloir d'hôpital

items.audioText: (A) The nurse is giving an injection to a patient. (B) The nurse is taking a patient's blood pressure. (C) The nurse is escorting a patient to a room. (D) The nurse is reviewing medical files.
choices: The nurse is giving an injection to a patient.
The nurse is taking a patient's blood pressure.
The nurse is escorting a patient to a room.
The nurse is reviewing medical files.
items.explanation: L'infirmière prend la tension artérielle du patient : (B) est correct.

image.alt: Un homme debout dans un entrepôt, vérifiant une liste sur une tablette pendant qu'un chariot élévateur passe en arrière-plan

items.audioText: (A) The man is driving a forklift in a warehouse. (B) The man is unloading boxes from a truck. (C) The man is checking a list on a tablet in a warehouse. (D) The man is repairing a forklift.
choices: The man is driving a forklift in a warehouse.
The man is unloading boxes from a truck.
The man is checking a list on a tablet in a warehouse.
The man is repairing a forklift.
items.explanation: Il consulte une tablette dans l'entrepôt pendant qu'un chariot élévateur passe : (C) est correct.

image.alt: Une femme assise à un bureau de coworking, travaillant sur un ordinateur portable, avec d'autres personnes en arrière-plan

items.audioText: (A) The woman is presenting slides to her colleagues. (B) The woman is working on a laptop at a coworking desk. (C) The woman is packing up her belongings. (D) The woman is on a video call.
choices: The woman is presenting slides to her colleagues.
The woman is working on a laptop at a coworking desk.
The woman is packing up her belongings.
The woman is on a video call.
items.explanation: Elle travaille sur son ordinateur portable dans un espace de coworking : (B) est correct.

image.alt: Un homme accrochant un tableau encadré sur un mur de bureau blanc

items.audioText: (A) The man is removing a painting from the wall. (B) The man is cleaning a framed picture. (C) The man is hanging a framed picture on a white office wall. (D) The man is packing artwork into a box.
choices: The man is removing a painting from the wall.
The man is cleaning a framed picture.
The man is hanging a framed picture on a white office wall.
The man is packing artwork into a box.
items.explanation: Il accroche un tableau sur un mur de bureau blanc : (C) est la description exacte.

image.alt: Des employés réunis autour d'un gâteau dans une salle de pause pour fêter un anniversaire ou une promotion

items.audioText: (A) Employees are decorating a conference room. (B) Employees are gathered around a cake in a break room. (C) Employees are preparing food in the cafeteria. (D) Employees are sitting down for a formal dinner.
choices: Employees are decorating a conference room.
Employees are gathered around a cake in a break room.
Employees are preparing food in the cafeteria.
Employees are sitting down for a formal dinner.
items.explanation: Des employés sont rassemblés autour d'un gâteau dans la salle de pause : (B) est correct.
